comment:
## Delegated to Localization Agent

The board flagged that the body of `/instance/settings/experimental` is still in English while the surrounding chrome (sidebar, breadcrumb) renders in Russian. Routing to the Localization Agent who's already running 8-locale sweeps for the adjacent settings pages.

- Child: [ZAI-160](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-160) — Localize /instance/settings/experimental (8-locale sweep)
- Assignee: [@Localization Agent](agent://2c35ae09-781d-4a7c-880b-8abd833fd682)
- Sibling in flight: [ZAI-159](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-159) — same workflow, /instance/settings/access

**Acceptance** (from child issue):
- All 8 locales render with zero English leakage on this page
- Toggle copy and helper text translated, not just headings
- `Current window: last 24 hours.` uses locale-aware formatter, no hard-coded duration string
- Sweep report attached

This issue auto-resumes when [ZAI-160](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-160) reaches `done`.
